trim.name: Audio Trimmer
trim.description: Cut and trim audio files to the desired length.
trim.metaTitle: Audio Trimmer - Cut Audio Files Online Free
trim.metaDescription: Trim and cut audio files to any length. Set precise start and end points. Free online tool.
trim.keywords: audio trimmer, cut audio, trim mp3, audio cutter online
trim.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: Most formats including MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC, and M4A are supported.
faq.a2: Yes, the tool uses stream copy mode so the original quality is preserved without re-encoding.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

volume.name: Volume Adjuster
volume.description: Adjust the volume level of audio files. Preview before applying.
volume.metaTitle: Audio Volume Adjuster - Change Volume Online Free
volume.metaDescription: Increase or decrease audio volume. Preview changes in real time before exporting. Free online tool.
volume.keywords: audio volume, volume adjuster, increase volume, decrease volume, audio gain
volume.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: Most formats including MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC, and M4A are supported.
faq.q2: Can I increase volume beyond the original level?
faq.a2: Yes, you can boost volume up to 300% of the original. Be aware that extreme amplification may introduce clipping distortion.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.q5: Can I preview the volume change before applying?
faq.a5: Yes. Click the Preview button to hear how the audio sounds at the adjusted volume level. The preview uses your browser's built-in audio processing for instant playback.
